title: White Border Flow Effects
description: Compare only monochrome white border-flow effects. Color, center spinners, dashed tracks, and heavy glow are removed so the choice stays minimal and unobtrusive.

shortEdgeFlow.title: Short Arc Border Flow
shortEdgeFlow.summary: A short white highlight loops around the border with the lowest visual weight.

longEdgeFlow.title: Long Arc Border Flow
longEdgeFlow.summary: A longer white highlight makes the loading state clearer while staying on the frame.

softEdgeFlow.title: Soft Border Flow
softEdgeFlow.summary: Lower brightness and slower movement for states that may remain visible longer.

dualEdgeFlow.title: Dual Arc Border Flow
dualEdgeFlow.summary: Two symmetric white highlights create steadier rhythm, but are more visible than one arc.
